bird.name: 巴拉望穗鹛
bird.summary: 巴拉望穗鹛（学名：Stachyris hypogrammica），是画眉科穗鹛属的一种，为菲律宾的特有种。该物种的保护状况被评为近危。 巴拉望穗鹛的栖息地为亚热带或热带的湿润山地林。

locations.name: 菲律宾
locations.summary: 菲律賓共和國（他加祿語：Republika ng Pilipinas；英語：Republic of the Philippines）簡稱菲律賓，是東南亞的群島國家。位於西太平洋，北隔呂宋海峽與臺灣相望，南隔西里伯斯海與印度尼西亚相望，西隔…

locations.name: 巴拉望省
locations.summary: 巴拉望省（Palawan），是菲律宾民马罗巴区下属的一个省，由主岛巴拉望岛，以及周边的卡拉棉群岛（1,753平方公里）、库约群岛、巴拉巴克岛等小岛组成，南隔巴拉巴克海峡与加里曼丹岛相望。另外，菲律宾声称部分南沙群岛（卡拉延群島）也归属该省…

relations.subject: 巴拉望穗鹛
relations.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines, where it is only found in Palawan

relations.subject: 巴拉望穗鹛

relations.subject: 巴拉望穗鹛
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical moist montane forest
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: 巴拉望穗鹛
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 巴拉望穗鹛
relations.evidence: Borangbato. Despite its extremely limited range, IUCN has assessed this bird as least concern but was formerly assessed as near-threatened. This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range.The whole of Palawan was designated as a Biosphere Reserve; however, protection and enforcement of laws has been difficult and these threats still continue
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
